meta.title: Private Dining | Radice
meta.description: Host your bespoke event in our exclusive private dining spaces, The Cantina and The Studio.

data.label: Bespoke Events
data.headline: Intimate Gatherings, Elevated
data.content: For special occasions that demand an unforgettable setting, Radice offers two distinct private dining spaces. Each provides the full depth of our culinary experience, tailored to the specific needs of your event with dedicated service and personalized menu planning.

image.alt: An elegantly set long table in a private dining room, ready for an event.

items.title: The Cantina
items.content: Our wine cellar offers a dramatic and intimate backdrop for up to 12 guests. Surrounded by our curated collection, it is ideal for celebratory dinners and executive meetings.

items.title: The Studio
items.content: Overlooking the kitchen, The Studio is a semi-private space for up to 8 guests. It offers a front-row seat to the energy and precision of our culinary team, perfect for the true gastronome.

items.title: Inquiries
items.content: Our events team is available to discuss your needs and curate a bespoke experience. Please reach out to events@radice.com for availability and menu consultation.
